narrative:
29 Ohio Senate district has 230,582 registered voters, with 55.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.0%, a modest Republican lean of 2.4 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -1.8% D−R vs -4.2% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
